prediction.reasoning: MRVL (Marvell Technology) prediction based on semiconductor sector volatility patterns. Used log-normal distribution assuming ~15% annualized volatility, scaled to weekly timeframe. Point estimate reflects modest positive momentum while confidence intervals account for sector-specific risk factors.
